extraction.one_line_summary: NIZZOLO Giacomo won the sprint from a 19-second gap group after QUINTANA Nairo crashed and lost 1:26, with SCHACHMANN retaining yellow through team time-bonus orchestration.
tactical_patterns: SAGAN Peter sacrificed intermediate sprint placement to deliver SCHACHMANN through for 3-second bonus, revealing domestique depth even from former champions.
NIBALI Vincenzo positioned in front split gaining 20 seconds on PINOT group, showing GC aggression on non-mountain stage.
SCHACHMANN drove final kilometer himself despite yellow jersey, prioritizing time gaps over stage win when NIBALI made front group.
BENNETT Sam abandoned sprint objectives to pace ALAPHILIPPE chase after crash, illustrating QuickStep stage-vs-GC hierarchy decision point.

rider_signals.NIZZOLO Giacomo: positive: Showed patience to win from exhausted front group sprint after 19-second selection, validates GC team protecting him through chaos
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Lost 1:26 from crash at 25km to go, race effectively over despite brother QUINTANA Dayer pacing
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: positive: Defended yellow by driving final km personally and orchestrating intermediate bonus through SAGAN, revealing exceptional team control
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: Made front split gaining 20 seconds on main GC rivals including PINOT on non-selective stage, tactical opportunism at age
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: Executed textbook lead-out for ACKERMANN despite not contesting himself, shows form but willingness to sacrifice placement
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Lost 1:26 in QUINTANA crash group despite BENNETT pacing, unexpectedly vulnerable when isolated from full QuickStep support
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: Led out by SAGAN but faded badly in final 200m to finish second, lacked snap after hard stage
rider_signals.STUYVEN Jasper: positive: Finished third in front group sprint and sits third GC, combining positioning intelligence with finishing speed
rider_signals.POLITT Nils: positive: Contested sprint from selection group finishing behind only pure sprinters, puncher showing stage-hunting versatility
